description: find_by_sql is acceptable when the query genuinely cannot be expressed in ActiveRecord DSL
input:
# Complex window function not expressible in AR DSL
class Post < ApplicationRecord
  def self.with_rank_by_author
    find_by_sql(<<~SQL)
      SELECT posts.*,
             RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY author_id ORDER BY view_count DESC) AS popularity_rank
      FROM posts
      WHERE published = true
    SQL
  end
end
